title: use absolute path for bundlePath
body:
When running buildah code on Atomic Hosts, we need to make sure
the absolute path for the bundlePath is used or operations
will fail.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: Solves a persistent issue with Podman's CI we've been encountering. LGTM
I tested this on a F27AH

:pushpin: Commit ecb2f8d has been approved by `nalind`
